## SteelPeak Wealth Acquires TSM Shares

Routine flow in TSM alongside contemporaneous sell-side disclosures; no net directional read without aggregate data.

- SteelPeak Wealth LLC acquired shares in Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (TSM).
- Routine institutional acquisition disclosure; no size or price disclosed.
- Classifier assigns low confidence and no fundamental signal.
- One of multiple TSM institutional flow stories—including both buys and a sell—appearing in the same period.
